name: lyra-security-appsec
description: Application security as coding rules on the source-to-sink model: trust-boundary validation, parameterized sinks (SQLi/command/path/XSS/SSTI), deny-by-default object-level authorization, solved-problem auth, SSRF and upload defenses, fail-closed errors, security headers, and an exploitability-ranked review methodology. Integrates with lyra-bug-hunter, lyra-security-secrets, lyra-security-supply-chain, lyra-security-containers.
